title: Important Dates for UGC-DAE CSR PhD Admission 2026

detail.title: Important Dates for UGC-DAE CSR PhD Admission 2026
detail.short_info: UGC-DAE CSR PhD Admission 2026: Apply online from 25 May to 15 June 2026 for the PhD programme at Indore, Mumbai & Kalpakkam centres. Check eligibility, vacancies, dates & direct application link.

content.text: UGC-DAE CSR PhD Admission 2026 (also known as UGC-DAE Consortium for Scientific Research PhD Programme 2026-27) is now open for applications. Registration starts on 25th May 2026 and the last date is 15th June 2026.

UGC-DAE Consortium for Scientific Research (UGC-DAE CSR) has invited applications for its Ph.D. programme (2026-27) at its centres in Indore, Mumbai, and Kalpakkam. The programme offers doctoral research in Physics and related interdisciplinary areas with access to advanced facilities like synchrotron sources, neutron scattering, and low-temperature high-magnetic field setups.
Direct Official Notification: Click Here
Direct Apply Link: Click Here
Key Highlights:

sections.heading: Important Dates for UGC-DAE CSR PhD Admission 2026

items: Indore Centre: 20 vacancies – Properties of materials at low temperatures & high magnetic fields, thin films/multilayers, microscopy, spectroscopic studies, theoretical condensed matter physics, single crystals, non-linear optics etc.
Mumbai Centre: 02 vacancies – Physics of quantum magnets, multiferroics, topological materials, rare-earth intermetallics, strongly-correlated electron systems.
Kalpakkam Centre: 06 vacancies – Nanostructured materials, magnetism in carbon-based materials, wide band gap materials, energy materials, flexible functional thin films.

sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for UGC-DAE CSR PhD 2026

content.text: For Indore, Mumbai & Kalpakkam Centres:

items: M.Sc. degree in Physics (2023 or after) with minimum 60% marks (55% for reserved & women candidates).
Must have qualified any one of the following: Valid CSIR-UGC NET (Category 1, 2 & 3) JEST 2026 (Rank within top 300) DST-Inspire Fellowship (Ph.D.)# GATE (Physics)
Valid CSIR-UGC NET (Category 1, 2 & 3)
JEST 2026 (Rank within top 300)
DST-Inspire Fellowship (Ph.D.)#
GATE (Physics)

content.text: #Final JRF offer for DST-Inspire candidates is subject to clearance of Level-II evaluation.
The official advertisement does not mention any application fee. Most candidates can apply free of cost. Confirm on the portal at the time of filling the form.

sections.heading: How to Apply for UGC-DAE CSR PhD Admission 2026

items: Visit the official application portal: https://inhousejrf.csr.res.in/
Register and fill the online application form.
Indicate your preference of CSR Centres.
Submit the form before 15 June 2026 (17:00 Hrs).

content.text: Apply Online Link: UGC-DAE CSR JRF Application Portal
The selection is a two-step process:

items: Screening of applications
Online interview of shortlisted candidates (tentative June/July 2026)

content.text: Selected students will be registered for Ph.D. with:

items: Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya (DAVV), Indore (for Indore Centre)
Savitribai Phule Pune University (SPPU) (for Mumbai Centre)
University of Madras (for Kalpakkam Centre)

seo_tags: UGC DAE CSR Mumbai Kalpakkam PhD
